## Checklist

- [ ] Entry follows the format: `[Name](URL) - Description ending with a period.`
- [ ] Description starts with uppercase, ends with period
- [ ] Commercial products marked with 💲 (and 🆓 if free tier exists)
- [ ] Entry is in the correct section
- [ ] No duplicate entries
- [ ] Link is valid and points to the primary source
